evals.prompt: My Next.js frontend works sometimes locally but Docker deploy keeps failing and ports are colliding. I need localhost and production URL both working.
evals.expected_output: Produces a layered debug report with fact sheet, classified root cause, minimal ordered fix steps, and explicit localhost/domain verification evidence.

evals.prompt: Hetzner server is up, domain points there, but reverse proxy returns 502 while container looks running. Help me isolate this fast.
evals.expected_output: Identifies proxy/domain layer as primary suspect, checks upstream mapping/listen bind/firewall, and returns exact verification commands plus rollback.

evals.prompt: I suspect Turbopack/Webpack mismatch and missing npm packages in Docker image. Give me the smallest safe fix plan.
evals.expected_output: Classifies app/container failure mode, enforces single bundler path, validates lockfile-driven install, and provides evidence-based gating.
